g.text: Dec 3 NEGATIVE CONTROL — amp250_freq26: compact PSTH heatmap for all 29 curated good units

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif

g.text: Each row is one unit, averaged across 200 trials; red shade = 3 s ON, grey shade = 3 s OFF — no ON-driven change (0/29 responsive)
